LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-04-02T14:43:58.036048
Mode: FULL.
Room length (m): 80, width (m): 150, ceiling height (m): 12.0
Required lux: 500.0, Standard Uo: 0.6
Work plane z = 0.75 m; fixture grid symmetric on full floor (edge inset = half of centre-to-centre spacing); illuminance grid 5x5 same rule.

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.14 lx (×0.7388)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=8.88888888888889, y=2.0547945205479454, edge half-spacing (m) x=4.444444444444445, y=1.0273972602739727, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 657, phi_each_lm=14500.00, phi_total_lm=9526500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 426.071439
  E_avg (lx): 500.141250
  E_max (lx): 563.691548
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.851902
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.755859

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    426.0714    459.8497    462.0867    459.8497    426.0714
    505.4008    548.8153    551.6084    548.8153    505.4008
    515.2481    560.7021    563.6915    560.7021    515.2481
    505.4008    548.8153    551.6084    548.8153    505.4008
    426.0714    459.8497    462.0867    459.8497    426.0714

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.64 lx (×0.7257)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=20.0, y=1.0067114093959733, edge half-spacing (m) x=10.0, y=0.5033557046979866, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 596, phi_each_lm=16000.00, phi_total_lm=9536000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 422.518168
  E_avg (lx): 500.640000
  E_max (lx): 547.154932
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.843956
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.772209

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    510.2888    544.9446    547.1549    544.9446    510.2888
    468.9020    511.8305    514.5981    511.8305    468.9020
    422.5182    466.8783    469.8372    466.8783    422.5182
    468.9020    511.8305    514.5981    511.8305    468.9020
    510.2888    544.9446    547.1549    544.9446    510.2888

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.85 lx (×0.7387)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=8.88888888888889, y=2.830188679245283, edge half-spacing (m) x=4.444444444444445, y=1.4150943396226414, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 477, phi_each_lm=20000.00, phi_total_lm=9540000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 426.729463
  E_avg (lx): 500.850000
  E_max (lx): 564.443644
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.852011
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.756018

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    426.7295    460.4634    462.7010    460.4634    426.7295
    506.1841    549.5520    552.3431    549.5520    506.1841
    516.0484    561.4529    564.4436    561.4529    516.0484
    506.1841    549.5520    552.3431    549.5520    506.1841
    426.7295    460.4634    462.7010    460.4634    426.7295

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.14 lx (×0.7342)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=13.333333333333334, y=2.0547945205479454, edge half-spacing (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=1.0273972602739727, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 438, phi_each_lm=21750.00, phi_total_lm=9526500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 445.933355
  E_avg (lx): 500.141250
  E_max (lx): 542.841071
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.891615
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.821480

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    445.9334    479.7774    482.0029    479.7774    445.9334

    496.8153    540.0584    542.8411    540.0584    496.8153
    445.9334    479.7774    482.0029    479.7774    445.9334

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=502.74 lx (×0.7411)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=4.2105263157894735, y=7.142857142857143, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.1052631578947367, y=3.5714285714285716, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 399, phi_each_lm=24000.00, phi_total_lm=9576000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 427.238416
  E_avg (lx): 502.740000
  E_max (lx): 566.909216
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.849820
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.753628

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    427.2384    460.3507    462.7482    460.3507    427.2384
    509.8210    552.4973    555.4463    552.4973    509.8210
    519.0198    563.7662    566.9092    563.7662    519.0198
    509.8210    552.4973    555.4463    552.4973    509.8210
    427.2384    460.3507    462.7482    460.3507    427.2384

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.85 lx (×0.7341)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=13.333333333333334, y=2.830188679245283, edge half-spacing (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=1.4150943396226414, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 318, phi_each_lm=30000.00, phi_total_lm=9540000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 446.622299
  E_avg (lx): 500.850000
  E_max (lx): 543.561352
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.891729
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.821659

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.90 lx (×0.7362)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=11.428571428571429, y=3.1914893617021276, edge half-spacing (m) x=5.714285714285714, y=1.5957446808510638, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 329, phi_each_lm=29000.00, phi_total_lm=9541000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 432.708461
  E_avg (lx): 500.902500
  E_max (lx): 569.180912
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.863858
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.760230

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=502.32 lx (×0.7402)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.153846153846154, y=6.521739130434782, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.076923076923077, y=3.260869565217391, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 299, phi_each_lm=32000.00, phi_total_lm=9568000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 427.914163
  E_avg (lx): 502.320000
  E_max (lx): 565.739854
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.851876
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.756380

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (3.0769, 3.2609)

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=504.00 lx (×0.7402)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.666666666666667, y=7.5, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.3333333333333335, y=3.75, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 240, phi_each_lm=40000.00, phi_total_lm=9600000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 429.695311
  E_avg (lx): 504.000000
  E_max (lx): 567.012094
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.852570
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.757824

Fixture positions (x, y) m:
  1: (3.3333, 3.7500)
  2: (3.3333, 11.2500)
  3: (3.3333, 18.7500)
  4: (3.3333, 26.2500)

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    429.6953    462.5231    464.7551    462.5231    429.6953
    510.7620    553.1114    555.8948    553.1114    510.7620
    519.6261    564.0347    567.0121    564.0347    519.6261
    510.7620    553.1114    555.8948    553.1114    510.7620
    429.6953    462.5231    464.7551    462.5231    429.6953

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 10 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC flood light exterior
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_FLOOD_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=500.14 lx (×0.7388)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=8.88888888888889, y=2.0547945205479454, edge half-spacing (m) x=4.444444444444445, y=1.0273972602739727, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=12.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 657, phi_each_lm=14500.00, phi_total_lm=9526500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 426.071439
  E_avg (lx): 500.141250
  E_max (lx): 563.691548
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.851902
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.755859
